case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MIGUEL ANGEL VEGA SOTO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL VEGA SOTO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
